title: tragacantha susiana
intro: Tragacantha susiana, also known as Susiana spiny milk thistle or more commonly known as Silybum marianum, is a biennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds of the plant, which are rich in silymarin, a complex mixture of flavonoids that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha susiana include protection against liver damage, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for liver and gallbladder problems. Tragacantha susiana is typically prepared as a supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as an herbal tea, and can also be used in topical applications to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
